data.title: Teck Resources to present at BMO conference on Feb. 23, 2026 at 1:30 p.m. Eastern/10:30 a.m. Pacific time. CEO to discuss strategy and financial outlook.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 17, 2026, Teck Resources Limited (TSX: TECK.A, TECK.B, NYSE: TECK) announces that their President and CEO, Jonathan Price, is scheduled to speak at the BMO Global Metals, Mining & Critical Minerals conference on February 23, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. Eastern/10:30 a.m. Pacific time. The presentation will cover company strategy, financial performance, and business units' outlook.

data.title: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. adds A. Troy Sturrock to board of managers to replace C.W. “Bill” Russell after his death.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Dorchester Minerals, L.P. revealed that A. Troy Sturrock has been assigned to the board of managers of the general partner of their general partner as an independent manager and advisory committee member starting from February 11, 2026. This appointment was made to replace C.W. “Bill” Russell, who passed away. Dorchester Minerals, L.P. is listed on the NASDAQ as DMLP.

data.title: Buenaventura reported 4Q25 results: 61.43% increase in gold production at El Brocal to 5,862 ounces.
data.description: LIMA, Peru--Compañía de Minas Buenaventura S.A.A. (“Buenaventura” or “the Company”) revealed its 4Q25 performance results for production and sales volume. As Peru’s largest publicly-traded precious metals mining firm, Buenaventura shared the following production figures in gold ounces: El Brocal saw a 61.43% increase, producing 5,862 ounces in the final quarter of 2025 and 21,102 ounces for the full year. Orcopampa, on the other hand, achieved 100% production, reaching 15,754 ounces during the same period. The company also provided production guidance for the year ending December 31, 2026, estimating a range of 15.0k to 17.0k ounces for El Brocal.

data.title: Liftoff Mobile, Inc. has submitted a draft S-1 registration statement for IPO to SEC. Date: Feb. 17, 2026. #IPO #LiftoffMobile
data.description: In Redwood City, California, on February 17, 2026, Liftoff Mobile, Inc. revealed that it has quietly filed a preliminary registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for its potential initial public offering. The company has not disclosed the specific details of the offering, such as the number of shares to be issued or the expected price range. The submission marks a significant step in Liftoff Mobile's journey towards becoming a publicly traded company, providing an opportunity for investors to participate in the company's growth and success.

data.title: Law firm investigating potential violations by Capital One Financial Corporation; investors with substantial losses urged to contact.
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by Edelson Lechtzin LLP in Newtown, Pennsylvania, concerning potential breaches of federal securities laws by Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE: COF) on February 17, 2026. The company is accused of engaging in deceptive business practices that may have violated securities regulations.

data.title: Airgain reports granting inducement awards under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4) on Feb 15, 2026 to new employees.
data.description: In San Diego, Airgain, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIRG), a top provider of advanced wireless connectivity solutions, disclosed the granting of inducement awards to fresh recruits. This announcement was made on February 15, 2026, under Airgain’s 2021 Employment Inducement Incentive Award Plan. The plan aims to offer equity awards to new hires as motivation to come aboard the company. The exact number of employees who received these awards was not specified in the announcement.

data.title: ATS will participate in Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference on March 3, 2026, with CEO and CFO present. Webcast available.
data.description: ATS Corporation (TSX: ATS) (NYSE: ATS) based in Cambridge, Ontario, released information that its CEO, Doug Wright, and Interim CFO, Anne Cybulski, will be attending the Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference in Orlando, FL on March 3, 2026. The Company is set to hold a fireside chat at 2:15 p.m. (ET) during the event. Those interested can access a webcast of the live session via the Investor Relations site at https://investors.atsau.

data.title: Enverus introduces Minerals Marketplace for mineral trade, offering off-market deals with zero fees.
data.description: Enverus, a prominent energy SaaS and analytics platform based in Austin, Texas, disclosed the introduction of Enverus Minerals Marketplace on February 17, 2026. This novel data-driven platform enables buyers and sellers to access exclusive off-market deals directly without incurring any transaction fees. This initiative marks a significant shift in the energy industry, promising enhanced efficiency for market participants.

data.title: Juvenile Idiopathic Arthritis market to grow at 5.6% by 2036 due to increased disease awareness and access to advanced therapies.
data.description: The market for juvenile idiopathic arthritis is seeing consistent growth due to increasing awareness of the disease, better diagnostic tools, and greater availability of advanced biologic treatments. The sector is further boosted by the introduction of new therapies like SOTYKTU by Bristol-Myers Squibb and BIMZELX. This growth is evident in the rising number of individuals seeking treatment, which is expected to continue increasing in the coming years. The market is estimated to reach new heights with a projected CAGR of X% over the forecast period, reflecting the growing demand for innovative solutions in managing juvenile idiopathic arthritis.

data.title: Live Nation Entertainment to present at Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference 2026 with CFO Joe Berchtold.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Los Angeles, Live Nation Entertainment, Inc. (NYSE: LYV), a top live entertainment company globally, revealed that Joe Berchtold, the company's President and Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to speak at Morgan Stanley's Technology event. This announcement was made by Live Nation Entertainment.

data.title: Analog Devices raises quarterly dividend by 11% to $1.10 per share, marking 22 years of growth.
data.description: Analog Devices, Inc., a prominent semiconductor company headquartered in Wilmington, Massachusetts, made an important financial decision on February 17, 2026. The company, listed on the NASDAQ as ADI, declared a substantial 11% rise in its quarterly dividend. With this increase, the dividend per outstanding share of common stock now stands at $1.10. This move comes as part of the company's continued commitment to rewarding its shareholders and marks an impressive streak of 22 consecutive years of dividend increases.

data.title: CA Credit Union helps members affected by government shutdown with special relief programs; announced on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: In response to the pay disruption faced by federal employees, California Credit Union in Glendale, California, announced on February 17, 2026, that special assistance will be provided to its members. The credit union introduced relief programs to aid existing members impacted by the situation. This initiative aims to provide support to affected individuals during this challenging period. Members experiencing financial difficulties due to the disruption in their pay can benefit from these specially designed assistance programs.

data.title: Leonnig and Davis will reveal Trump's DOJ interference at book event on Feb. 19 at National Press Club.
data.description: Renowned journalists Carol Leonnig and Aaron C. Davis, recipients of the prestigious Pulitzer Prize, are set to present their latest book "Injustice: How Politics and Fear Defeated the U.S. Justice Department" at the upcoming Headliners Book Event on Thursday, Feb. 19, starting at 6 p.m. This highly anticipated discussion will delve into the compelling narrative exploring the decline of the Justice Department in America.
Chemung Financial Corporation declares dividend for this quarter.

data.title: Royalties firm to pay dividends in XAUT, Tether's tokenized gold, offering unique investment opportunity.
data.description: Elemental Royalty announced a new option for investors to receive dividends in Tether's XAUT, offering a unique opportunity for those holding tokenized gold.

data.title: GE Vernova declares $0.50 quarterly dividend, payable on April 14, 2026 to shareholders of record by March 17, 2026.
data.description: A dividend of $0.50 per share has been declared by GE Vernova (NYSE: GEV) in Cambridge, Mass. The quarterly dividend is set to be paid on April 14, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of March 17, 2026. The Board of Directors will decide on future dividend declarations, considering GE Vernova’s earnings, financial status, cash needs, prospects, and other relevant factors. More details can be found on GE Vernova’s website.

data.title: Gen partners with Vercel to offer safety verification for AI skills ecosystem on skills.sh, ensuring protection for users and developers.
data.description: Gen's Agent Trust Hub is set to enhance risk verification on skills.sh, safeguarding developers and users against potentially harmful AI skills. The Hub's introduction signifies a crucial development in the AI landscape, addressing the shift towards autonomous digital actors performing real-world actions. This initiative aims to promote safety and security in AI technology, creating a more reliable environment for all involved. The announcement was made in Mountain View, California on February 17, 2026.

data.title: Caribbean Utilities Company, Ltd. reported $47.4 million in earnings for 2025, achieving $7.9M in fuel savings and 33% outage reduction.
data.description: Caribbean Utilities Company, Ltd. has reported its audited results for the year ended December 31, 2025, showing significant growth and value creation for customers and shareholders. Key highlights include a total earnings increase of 11% to $47.4 million for the year, with $46.3 million in earnings specifically for Class A ordinary shares. The company successfully implemented a Battery Energy Storage System and life cycle upgrades, resulting in $7.9 million in fuel cost savings for customers in 2025. Additionally, outage interruption hours were reduced by 33% compared to 2024, surpassing North American reliability averages. A 3% dividend increase was approved, reflecting the company's financial strength and commitment to shareholder value. Capital expenditures for 2025 amounted to $88.9 million, leading to a $4.7 million increase in net earnings from the previous year. The company aims to continue building a sustainable and affordable energy future for the Grand Cayman community.

data.title: Fredonia Mining Inc. completes early warrant exercise program, raising $473,000 from 1,576,666 $0.30 warrants.
data.description: In Toronto on February 17, 2026, Fredonia Mining Inc. shared their delight in revealing that, following their earlier press release from December 17, 2025, they have received around $473,000 from the exercise of 1,576,666 share purchase warrants, known as the $0.30 Warrants. These warrants were exercised at a price of $0.30 per underlying common share, referred to as the Warrant Shares, under the Program aimed at incentivizing early warrant exercise.

data.title: MedStar Health partners with EB Medicine to enhance urgent care fellowship training and CME; boosts clinician development.
data.description: One of the top healthcare systems in the Mid-Atlantic region, MedStar Health, has chosen EB Medicine to provide enhanced Continuing Medical Education (CME) for advanced clinician development. This decision signifies MedStar's commitment to offering more comprehensive and robust training. The selection of EB Medicine underlines MedStar Health's dedication to continually improving its healthcare services.
